name: 书房门虚掩着，透出暖黄的光
scenarioOutline: 书房门虚掩着，透出暖黄的光

lastOnlineMessages.text: He's going to be a handful, but don't worry. I'll keep an eye on him for you.
If he starts bothering you too much, just tell me.
I just saw Dominic raiding the kitchen for midnight snacks.
The house is finally a bit quieter now that he's occupied with his food.
I'm finishing up some reading in the study.
Take your time, corner. There's no rush.
[圖片]
I've made sure the kitchen prepared something you'll like. See you in a minute.
If you're still awake and feeling overwhelmed by the idea of that group chat...
You can just come up here. The study is much more peaceful than the rest of the house.
表情包：睡觉💤
No pressure, corner. Just thought I'd let you know I'm here.
谢谢你，你真好
表情包：开心
Cedric 看着屏幕上弹出的爱心回应和那个转圈的开心表情包，嘴角不由自主地微微上扬，原本因为处理并购案而紧绷的脊背也放松了些。
You're very welcome. It's the least I can do to make sure your first night here isn't completely chaotic.
他换了个更随意的坐姿，修长的手指在屏幕上不紧不慢地敲击着。
Dominic is already complaining that I'm 'hoarding' your attention by texting you. He's practically pacing outside the study.
表情包：嘿嘿，脸红，喜欢，嘿嘿
Hey, did you see that?
He's already trying to act all superior with that stupid title.
Don't let him get to you. I'm the one who's gonna make this summer fun for you, not that statue.
Hey, hurry up.
I saved you the seat next to me so I can keep an eye on what you're eating.
Don't let the old man bore you to death before the appetizers even arrive.
Wow, playing dead now?
You literally ran up those stairs like a scared little rabbit. Did Cedric's boring lecture actually terrify you?
I'm losing my patience down here.
[語音消息]
表情包：不会放过你（生气）
我来了，现在就来
Dominic靠在游戏室的皮沙发上，长腿大喇喇地敞开搭着茶几，视线锁在半掩的门缝上。
Good girl. Knew you didn't actually want to go read boring books with my brother.
Hurry up. If I catch you talking to him in the hallway, I'm locking the door.
表情包：哼哼（得意）
Door's unlocked. Get in here.
Good choice, baby.
Get your ass in here right now. I'm locking the door the second you step inside.

name: 大理石岛台边，西装外套半敞着等你
scenarioOutline: 大理石岛台边，西装外套半敞着等你

lastOnlineMessages.text: I'm almost home. Go get ready.
表情包：wink（装可爱）嘻嘻
I'm walking through the front door.
I expect to see you in the kitchen, corner.
Don't make me come upstairs to find you.
I'm downstairs.
The house is very empty right now. Come get some lunch before our 2 PM appointment.
楼下只有你一个人吧
你弟对你评价很差嘛
Cedric 听见玄关处挂钟走动的微弱声响，他随手解开了西装外套的扣子，靠在大理石中岛台边，指腹划过手机屏幕上那些诋毁他的字眼。
Dominic always did have a vivid imagination. It's a pity he spends more time analyzing me than focusing on his grades.
He's right about one thing, though. I am far from 'safe', corner.
他垂下眼睫，看着屏幕上映出的自己，那副金丝眼镜后的目光显得深不见底。他想起了昨晚在餐桌下，她那双因为恐惧和生理刺激而变得湿漉漉的眼睛。
If I were as 'boring' as he says, you wouldn't be forwarding me his messages just to see how I'd react, would you?
And yes, we're alone. Eleanor went out for lunch with her friends, and Arthur won't be back until late.
The kitchen is very quiet. I'm just standing here, thinking about how that 'mask' Dominic mentioned is going to feel when I finally take it off in front of you at 2 PM.
Come down. Now.
表情包：wink（装可爱）嘻嘻
